DECLARE doc_base VARCHAR; DECLARE doc_tree ANY; doc_base := 'http://example.com/resources/'; doc_tree := xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(xml_uri_get(doc_base, 'image.png')), doc_base);
DECLARE doc_base VARCHAR; DECLARE doc_tree ANY; doc_base := 'file:///local/path/to/resources/'; doc_tree := xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(xml_uri_get(doc_base, 'document.xml')), doc_base);

DECLARE doc_base VARCHAR; DECLARE doc_tree ANY; doc_base := 'virt://WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES.RES_FULL_PATH.RES_CONTENT:/DAV/docsrc/'; doc_tree := xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(xml_uri_get(doc_base, 'virtdocs.xml')), doc_base); SELECT * FROM xml_table(doc_tree);

DECLARE doc_base VARCHAR; DECLARE doc_tree ANY; doc_base := 'virt://WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES.RES_FULL_PATH.RES_CONTENT:/DAV/'; INSERT INTO data_table (data_column) SELECT xml_uri_get(doc_base, 'additional_data.xml');

DECLARE doc_base VARCHAR; DECLARE doc_tree ANY; doc_base := 'http://example.com/resources/'; doc_tree := xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(xml_uri_get(doc_base, 'resource.xml')), doc_base); SELECT doc_tree FROM another_table WHERE xml_exists(doc_tree);

DECLARE doc_base VARCHAR; DECLARE doc_tree ANY; doc_base := 'http://example.com/data/'; doc_tree := xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(xml_uri_get(doc_base, 'child/resource.xml')), doc_base); SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_table(doc_tree) WHERE xml_value(doc_tree, '/root/element') IS NOT NULL;

DECLARE doc_base VARCHAR; DECLARE doc_tree ANY; doc_base := 'virt://WS.WS.SYS_DAV_RES.RES_FULL_PATH.RES_CONTENT:/DAV/docsrc/'; SET doc_tree = xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(xml_uri_get(doc_base, 'nested_structure.xml')), doc_base); SELECT doc_tree FROM xml_nested_table WHERE nested_conditions;

DECLARE doc_base VARCHAR; DECLARE doc_tree ANY; doc_base := 'http://fileserver/resources/'; doc_tree := xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(xml_uri_get(doc_base, 'complex.xml')), doc_base); INSERT INTO xml_storage (xml_data) VALUES (doc_tree);

DECLARE doc_base VARCHAR; DECLARE doc_tree ANY; doc_base := 'virtdocs:/'; doc_tree := xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(xml_uri_get(doc_base, 'overview.xml')), doc_base); SELECT xml_to_string(doc_tree) AS xml_data FROM xml_preview_table WHERE id = 1;

DECLARE doc_base VARCHAR; DECLARE doc_tree ANY; doc_base := 'http://example.com/api/'; doc_tree := xml_tree_doc(xml_tree(xml_uri_get(doc_base, 'user/profile.xml')), doc_base); SELECT * FROM users WHERE profile = xml_value(doc_tree, '/user/name');
